zh.York, North Yorkshire, England, United K: 英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾約克
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Vavasour於1310年出生在英國越可爾韋斯頓時，他的父親John Vavasour25歲，母親Margaret Middelton-41歲。他於大約1327年與Agnes Beneville在英國英格蘭越可爾韋斯頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1380年享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Vavasour于1310年出生在英国越可爾韋斯頓时，他的父亲John Vavasour25岁，母亲Margaret Middelton-41岁。他于大约1327年与Agnes Beneville在英国英格兰越可爾韋斯頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1380年享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vavasour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: status name for a feudal tenant ranking immediately below a baron, Old French vavas(s)our, vavasseur, Latin vassus vassorum ‘vassal of vassals’.

variants.name: Bavister
meanings: English: Titford suggests that this is a late variant of Vavasour . It would be a dissimilated form of Vavister and Vavester, variants of Vavasour that are evidenced in Lincs, also in Cambs, whence the name spread into Beds. Compare Willa Vavister, 1579 in IGI (Scopwick, Lincs); Thomas Vavister, 1615 in IGI (Cranwell, Lincs); Mary Vavester, 1708, Joseph Vavisor, 1738 in IGI (New Sleaford, Lincs).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Vavasour was born in 1310, in Weston, Yorkshire, England, his father, John Vavasour, was 25 and his mother, Margaret Middelton, was -41. He married Agnes Beneville about 1327, in Weston, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1380, at the age of 70.

ko.lifeSummary: John Vavasour(이)가 1310년 영국 요르크실르 웨스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Vavasour(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Middelton(은)는 -41세였다. 그는 대략 1327년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 웨스턴에서 Agnes Beneville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1380년 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Vavasour родился в 1310 г. в местности вестон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Vavasour было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Middelton, -41. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Beneville около 1327 г. в местности вестон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1380 г. в возрасте 70 лет.
